SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.dispersion

Class HazardousAreaCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.dispersion.HazardousAreaCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HazardousAreaCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Hazardous-area classification per IEC 60079-10-1 / API RP 505 for gas jet releases.

Estimates the hazardous distance (distance to the lower flammable limit, LFL) and the resulting zone classification from a continuous, primary or secondary grade of release. The hazardous distance is computed with a turbulent free-jet axial concentration-decay model (Chen & Rodi 1980), which underpins the IEC 60079-10-1 Annex C jet method:

  • Effective (notional) source diameter from the mass flow and exit conditions: d_e = sqrt(4·ṁ / (π·ρ_e·U_e))
  • Axial mass-fraction decay: Y(x) = 5.4·sqrt(ρ_e/ρ_a)·d_e / x
  • Hazardous distance to a (de-rated) LFL mass fraction: x_LFL = 5.4·sqrt(ρ_e/ρ_a)·d_e / (k·Y_LFL)
The LFL volume fraction is converted to a mass fraction using the gas and air molar masses. The safety factor k (typically 0.25–0.5) applies a margin below LFL per IEC 60079-10-1.

The grade of release sets the zone type: continuous → Zone 0, primary → Zone 1, secondary → Zone 2.

References: IEC 60079-10-1:2020 (Explosive atmospheres — Classification of areas — Explosive gas atmospheres), API RP 505, Chen C.J. & Rodi W. (1980) Vertical Turbulent Buoyant Jets.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • HazardousAreaCalculator

      public HazardousAreaCalculator(double massFlowKgPerS, double exitDensityKgPerM3, double exitVelocityMPerS, double lflVolumeFraction, double gasMolarMassKgPerMol)
      Construct a hazardous-area calculator for a gas jet release.
      Parameters:
      massFlowKgPerS - release mass flow in kg/s
      exitDensityKgPerM3 - gas density at the release plane in kg/m³
      exitVelocityMPerS - gas velocity at the release plane in m/s
      lflVolumeFraction - lower flammable limit as a volume (mole) fraction (e.g. 0.044 for methane)
      gasMolarMassKgPerMol - gas molar mass in kg/mol

  • Method Details

    • setAmbientDensityKgPerM3

      public HazardousAreaCalculator setAmbientDensityKgPerM3(double rho)

      rho - ambient density in kg/m³
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setSafetyFactor

      public HazardousAreaCalculator setSafetyFactor(double k)
      Set the safety factor applied below the LFL (default 0.5; IEC 60079-10-1 commonly 0.25–0.5).
      Parameters:
      k - safety factor in (0,1]
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setReleaseGrade

      public HazardousAreaCalculator setReleaseGrade(HazardousAreaCalculator.ReleaseGrade grade)
      Set the grade of release (default SECONDARY → Zone 2).
      Parameters:
      grade - the grade of release
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining
